title: CodeMirror 6 language support for Mermaid diagrams
purpose: Provides syntax highlighting and tokenization for Mermaid diagram code in CodeMirror 6 editor.
module_context: Defines a StreamLanguage configuration for Mermaid syntax with custom tokenization rules for diagram types, keywords, operators, strings, numbers, and other elements.

steps.content: Match and return comment tokens when %% is encountered.
Match and return string tokens for double or single quoted text.
Match and return string tokens for text within brackets, parentheses, or braces.
Match and return keyword tokens for diagram type keywords at line start or after whitespace.
Match and return atom tokens for direction keywords.
Match and return keyword tokens for sequence diagram keywords.
Match and return keyword tokens for flowchart and graph keywords.
Match and return keyword tokens for class diagram keywords.
Match and return keyword tokens for state diagram keywords.
Match and return keyword tokens for ER diagram keywords.
Match and return keyword tokens for Gantt chart keywords.
Match and return keyword tokens for pie chart keywords.
Match and return keyword tokens for common keywords.
Match and return def tokens for style definition keywords.
Match and return operator tokens for arrow operators in various formats.
Match and return operator tokens for ER diagram relationships.
Match and return bracket tokens for node shape brackets.
Match and return number tokens for hex color values.
Match and return number tokens for numbers with optional units.
Match and return number tokens for dates.
Match and return number tokens for duration values.
Match and return atom tokens for state and condition keywords.
Match and return atom tokens for special state markers.
Match and return variable tokens for identifiers and node IDs.
Match and return punctuation tokens for separators.
Skip whitespace and track its presence in the state.
Advance the stream and return null for unrecognized characters.
Initialize and return the state object with afterWhitespace set to true.
